name: Datasite M&A Virtual Data Room API
what_it_does: Datasite M&A and capital markets virtual data room REST API for investment banks, law firms, and corporate development teams to manage secure document sharing, due diligence, and deal workflow for mergers, acquisitions, and capital raises. Enables AI agents to manage project and deal room creation for M&A transaction workflow automation, handle document upload and permission management for due diligence document access automation, access Q&A and question management for deal due diligence workflow automation, retrieve deal analytics and document activity reporting for M&A process management automation, manage bidder and advisor access provisioning for buy-side due diligence automation, handle redaction and secure document preparation for confidential document management automation, access AI-powered document review and analysis for deal document analysis automation, retrieve NDA and access agreement management for deal participant onboarding automation, manage document index and data room organization for due diligence structure automation, and integrate Datasite with deal management, CRM, and financial systems for end-to-end M&A transaction management.
use_cases: Managing M&A due diligence from deal workflow automation agents
Provisioning buyer access from transaction management automation agents
Processing Q&A from deal due diligence coordination agents
Reporting deal activity from M&A analytics automation agents
not_for: General file sharing and collaboration (use SharePoint or Box)
Regulatory document management (use Veeva Vault or OpenText)
Litigation document review (use Relativity or Everlaw)
best_when: An investment bank, corporate development team, law firm, or private equity firm wanting AI agents to automate M&A due diligence room management, buyer access provisioning, Q&A workflow, and deal analytics within Datasite's secure VDR platform.
avoid_when: NDA EXECUTION BEFORE DATA ROOM ACCESS: Automated buyer access provisioning via Datasite must confirm NDA execution before granting data room access; automated access provisioning without NDA confirmation creates confidential information disclosure without legal protection. INSIDER TRADING RESTRICTION FOR PUBLIC COMPANY DEALS: Automated deal document access and notification for transactions involving publicly-traded companies must comply with insider trading policies; automated data room access reporting that reveals undisclosed deal activity to persons outside the deal team creates insider trading exposure. HIGHLY SENSITIVE DOCUMENT REDACTION REVIEW: Automated document redaction via Datasite AI must include review before distribution; automated redaction without attorney review may miss sensitive terms requiring redaction; incomplete redaction of PII, trade secrets, or privileged material in distributed due diligence documents creates irreversible disclosure.

auth.notes: Datasite uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Minneapolis, Minnesota HQ. Founded 1968 as Merrill Corporation, rebranded to Datasite in 2020. Private (acquired by Golub Capital in 2022). Leading M&A virtual data room and deal management platform. 13,000+ deals per year. AI-powered due diligence, Q&A management, and document analytics. SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001, ISO 27018. Competes with Intralinks (SS&C), Ansarada, and Venue (Donnelley) for VDR and deal management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-project pricing for deal rooms
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-project fee based on deal size and duration; enterprise subscription for high-volume investment banks and corporate development teams; API access included in enterprise engagement
pricing.notes: Minneapolis MN. Private (Golub Capital). Founded 1968. Per-project pricing. Enterprise subscription for high-volume deal teams. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; document and deal queries throttled; webhooks for document access and Q&A events

known_agent_gotchas: NDA VERIFICATION GATE BEFORE ACCESS PROVISIONING: Automated buyer access provisioning via Datasite API must query NDA execution status before granting data room permissions; automated provisioning without NDA confirmation creates confidential information disclosure without legal recourse; implement NDA status check as mandatory gate in automated access workflow

DOCUMENT WATERMARKING FOR ACCESS LOGGING: Datasite supports automated document watermarking with viewer identity for access tracking; automated document distribution without watermarking creates untraceable distribution of confidential deal materials; enable automated watermarking for all documents in deal rooms with sensitive transaction information

Q&A WORKFLOW SELLER REVIEW GATE: Automated Q&A response processing via Datasite must route buyer questions through seller counsel review before automated response distribution; automated Q&A response without seller review creates uncontrolled disclosure of deal-sensitive information; implement mandatory seller counsel review gate in automated Q&A workflow

DEAL ROOM ACCESS LOG FOR REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: M&A deals involving regulatory approval (HSR, EU merger control) must maintain deal room access audit log; automated access provisioning must generate defensible access log for regulatory authority document requests; implement access log preservation for deals requiring regulatory filing

BIDDER ISOLATION IN COMPETITIVE AUCTION PROCESS: Automated access management for competitive M&A auction processes must enforce bidder isolation; automated permission misconfiguration that grants one bidder access to another bidder's Q&A or bid materials creates auction process breach and potential deal litigation; verify bidder isolation in automated permission structure

AI REDACTION MISS RISK FOR SENSITIVE DOCUMENT CLASSES: Datasite AI redaction feature for sensitive document preparation requires review for specialized document categories (technical trade secrets, legal privilege, personal health information); automated redaction without attorney review creates residual disclosure risk for documents with redaction-sensitive content beyond standard PII patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: M&A VDR. SOC2, ISO27001, ISO27018. OAuth2. Global. Confidential deal documents, M&A financials, and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: M&A VDR. SOC2, ISO27001, ISO27018. OAuth2. Global. Confidential deal documents and M&A transaction data.
